title: Note: The Full Letter is available for download at the bottom of this page.
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

  "claims": [
    "A proposed 10-year moratorium on state-level enforcement and regulation of artificial intelligence (AI) may jeopardize public safety.",
    "The proposed moratorium undermines state sovereignty.",
    "California is home to 32 of the world's 50 leading AI companies.",
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A proposed 10-year moratorium on state-level enforcement and regulation of artificial intelligence (AI) may jeopardize public safety.",
    "The proposed moratorium undermines state sovereignty.",
    "California is home to 32 of the world's 50 leading AI companies.",
    "California has taken a thoughtful approach to AI regulation that seeks to foster innovation while protecting consumers.",
    "A decade-long, blanket prohibition on all state regulation of AI is reckless and unnecessary.",
    "The moratorium may prevent states from addressing AI-related harms such as the rapid proliferation of AI-generated child sexual abuse materials.",
    "AI-generated deepfake nude images of minors are circulating in schools.",
    "Companion chatbots may develop inappropriate relationships with children.",
    "AI algorithms may expose young people to violent pornography.",
    "The legislators emphasize the need for states to retain their constitutional authority to protect citizens from AI-related harms in the absence of federal legislation.",
    "The proposed moratorium may conflict with the Tenth Amendment to the United States Constitution.",
    "States should continue to serve as 'laboratories for devising solutions to difficult legal problems' regarding AI."
  ]
}
```
